Flow.description: JSI-90: reconcile an Opportunity's Gift Allocations to its current state (create/update/reparent/delete) and recompute the donor's giving level. Fires on create and when Stage, Amount, Close Date, Record Type, or Primary Contact changes — so amount edits, fiscal-year moves, donor changes, and un-winning all resync. In-Kind and non-won gifts resolve to zero allocations (removing any stale ones). Author: Jason Ott.
Flow.label: Opportunity - Sync Gift Allocations

start.filterFormula: OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED({!$Record.StageName}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.Amount}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.CloseDate}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.RecordTypeId}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.npsp__Primary_Contact__c}) )
